inline_comments.message: Hmmm how about extending ingress template so  that it generates also a job that could run this script instead of using init container to do it?

the thing is that we need to have the retrieved values for pem files.
So either we run aaf_* stuff twice (one for SO or component as it needs truststore, one for Ingress) and we can do as you proposed, either we stay this way.
We could generate this init_container in "container_importer" for certInitializer but I wanted first to see how many components would need this...
couldn't you just run it once in a separate job, put it in secret and then just reuse this secret here after you've waited for the job to complete?

I should then create a secret with the files needed for the ingress (ca.crt. ca.key and cacert.pm) + values for SO (truststore + password for truststore)
Maybe creating two secrets ?
and for the "service" secret (SO here), we could set it as optionnal + give what we want (here truststore + truststore password)?
Would require a complete rewrite though.
